bio: Paulo was originally known as Poppy until we realized he was actually a he! Now 3 and a half years old and fully grown but still petite for a male, you can find him in the park in Cluster P, greeting visitors or hopping onto benches in search of a cosy lap. He's incredibly affectionate and confident, often choosing people himself and settling in for cuddles. With his beautifully silky soft fur and calm, gentle nature, he makes a favourite with both humans and other cats. Easygoing and social despite being a little fussy with his food, Paulo would fit beautifully into a loving home.
